response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years in the industry and recent, relevant experience in AI agent infrastructure. His entrepreneurial work on GISCollective and his history of leading workshops demonstrate initiative and a passion for sharing knowledge. However, his experience appears to be at a Staff Engineer level, focusing on project execution and team-level contributions, which falls short of the Director-level strategic leadership and customer advisory responsibilities required for this Principal Engineer role.
strengths: Extensive and broad software engineering experience (18+ years) across web, mobile, and backend.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of the open-source GISCollective platform.
concerns: Lacks demonstrated experience in a Director-level or Principal Engineer role focused on high-level AI/cloud strategy for a large organization.
Resume does not show experience advising strategic customers or partners on technology adoption.
Experience is primarily as a hands-on developer and project lead, not a high-level strategic influencer as the role requires.
